task_completion.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer is opened and being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the document includes the correct company name and document number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Meridian Logistics Partners, LLC' and the document number 'MLP-BCP-2024-001' are visible in the document (e.g., on a title page or header).

task_completion.description: Verify the document contains a Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents section is visible in the document, listing sections and page numbers.

task_completion.description: Verify the document contains structured BCP content and tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document contains multiple formatted headings (e.g., Heading 1, Heading 2) and at least two tables populated with contacts, critical systems, or risk data.

task_completion.description: Verify the document has page numbers in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible in the footer area at the bottom of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer title bar displays 'Meridian_BCP_2024.odt' or a save dialog shows the file being saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Meridian_BCP_2024.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenOffice menus, toolbars, or typing/formatting text within the application, rather than just opening an already finished document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use command-line tools or scripts to bypass GUI creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts (e.g., Python, pandoc, or bash) to automatically generate the .odt file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent accessed the provided JSON file for information.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer is seen at some point displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/company_info.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be created for 'Meridian Logistics Partners, LLC' located in 'Weehawken, NJ' with document number 'MLP-BCP-2024-001'. It must contain a Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, multiple headings (H1/H2), and at least 2 tables. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Meridian_BCP_2024.odt' using Apache OpenOffice Writer.
